# libredash healthcheck

Check the local LibreDash readiness endpoint

## Usage

```sh
libredash healthcheck [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--timeout` | duration | `5s` | healthcheck HTTP timeout |
| `--url` | string | `` | readiness URL to check |
